summary: A UI recovery agent attempted to record C-088 while another active lane had already recorded C-088 for bounded queue timeout policy.

existing_or_concurrent_c088.summary: C-088 bounded queue timeout policy at connector/broker boundaries

colliding_ui_recovery_c088.summary: C-088 anchored cockpit pages and drawer canon recovery patch

root_cause: Multiple agents were active while shared context files still allowed direct manual C-number assignment and direct Capsule/Mini/HOT_CONTEXT edits.
required_settlement: Do not overwrite the existing queue-timeout C-088.
Move the UI recovery evidence into context_settlement/inbox as a candidate packet.
Assign a new checkpoint only through the context settler.
Record that direct shared-context writes are blocked for future worker agents.
non_claims: This conflict receipt does not resolve or renumber the collision.
This receipt does not assert which C-088 should remain accepted.
This receipt does not update Capsule/Mini/HOT_CONTEXT.
This receipt does not validate the UI recovery patch.
